statement: In every magma, Equation 2311 (`x = (y * (x * (z * x))) * y`) implies Equation 3542 (`x * y = x * ((z * w) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0023
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op z x))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op z w) z))
